calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Lift Protective Order
Off Calendar Jun-06-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
David K. Morrison, for Defendant/moving party
No appearance for Plaintiff.
Ruling:
Hearing held and Tentative Ruling adopted: Defendants' Motion To Lift Protective Order is ordered off calendar. The motion was not properly noticed. C.C.P. Section 1005(b) requires 16 court days plus five days for mailing. The first date for which this motion could have been noticed is June 7, 2005.COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
